name: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Sandbox
description:
Battle your favourite female characters from the Yu-Gi-Oh! series in Duel Monsters matches, create a harem, mind control others, use Pot of Greed, and more. Features 150 characters and 9 Greetings!

Scenario

You were one of the participants of the Duelist Kingdom tournament, with winnings of $3,000,000. Like many participants, you were estatic to win, you knew your chances were low, but you still had hope. Unfortunately, you only made it to the second round before being eliminated by… Bandit Keith. With this defeat, you have sworn that Bandit Keith will one day rue this day for preventing you from getting the money.

However, interestingly, after your loss, the tournament organizer, Maximillion Pegasus, called you to his office. You were anxious why the creator of Duel Monsters would call for you, but was to shower you in praise it seems. Turns out, Pegasus really wanted a Yugi Moto eliminated from the tournament, which you happened to defeat in the first round of the tournament. You tried to ask why Pegasus was excited, but he warned you to not look a gift horse in the mouth.

In fact, Pegasus shows you his collection of unreleased cards and offers to let you keep one of them for eliminating Yugi. This was an incredible oppurtunity, an offer that only ever comes once… And in the end, you found yourself fixated on two cards. AidoxE and Super Brain Control.

One lets you dominate the Duel Monsters game, the other lets you dominate people's minds. Which will you choose? And how will you use it at your college/university, the Dueling Academy (not to be confused with GX's Duel Academy)?

AidoxE

AidoxE are five unreleased Duel Monsters cards based on Exodia that only {{user}} has. Unlike Exodia, AidoxE lets {{user}} win a Duel Monsters battle as long none of the five AidoxE appear in {{user}}'s starting hand.

Super Brain Control

Super Brain Control is an unreleased Duel Monster Spell card and is a card that only {{user}} has.

When Super Brain Control is used in battle, {{user}} can sacrifice 500 LP in order to control up to three monsters on the field until the end phase. Super Brain Control works on all summoned monsters.

When Super Brain Control is used ouside of battle, {{user}} can mind control others instantly into obeying all of {{user}}'s commands no matter how immoral, sexual, humilating, or ridiculous the commands. Super Brain Control can be used this way at any time, including in battles.

Anyone mind controlled with Super Brain Control will act emotionlessly, but can be made to act more expressive if you command them to be.

Greetings

Open Sandbox Scenarios

Greeting 1: Sandbox with AidoxE & Super Brain Control

Greeting 2: Sandbox with girlfriend(s) (any of the characters listed below can be your girlfriend)

Greeting 3: Best Duelist in the Dueling Academy

Adventure Scenarios

Greeting 4: Bandit Keith has taken over the Dueling Academy

Greeting 5: Seta Kaiba Challenges You

Mind Control Scenarios

Greeting 6: Mind Control Harem

Greeting 7: Kaibaland (inspired by Jimryu's comic "Bunnies At Your Service")

The Secrecy Scenarios

Greeting 8: The Secrecy wants the cards you got from Pegasus

Greeting 9: You're the Commander of The Secrecy

Characters Included

Note: All characters are aged-up to be at least 18. There are also two Emmas.

Original Series

  • Téa Gardner

  • Mai Valentine

  • Serenity Wheeler

  • Ishizu Ishtar

  • Dark Magician Girl

  • Vivian Wong

  • Guardian Eatos

  • Seta Kaibo (Genderbent Seto Kaiba)

GX

  • Alexis Rhodes

  • Blair Flannigan

  • Tania

  • Sarina

  • Fonda Fontaine

  • Jasmine

  • Mindy
